sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88035" key="promikk<ix>iddo/menos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμικκ[ιχ]ιδδόμενος</orth>, <sense id="n88035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boy in his second year,</tr_> prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προκομιζόμενος</foreign> in <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Αέξεις Ἡροδότου</foreign> in Stein Hdt.ii <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0526.tlg004.perseus-grc1:p.465" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.465</biblScope> </bibl> (Berol.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0526.tlg004.perseus-grc1:1871" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1871</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
